name: USG
short_description: 'USG' Is a captivating vertical shoot 'em up featuring hand-drawn animations and a unique art style. Customize your run with multiple weapon upgrades
detailed_description:
'USG' Is a captivating vertical shoot 'em up featuring hand-drawn animations and a unique art style. Customise your run with multiple weapon upgrades

Story:

The protagonist wakes up and finds herself connected to the unknown machine, her head hanging in the air and her hand holding the gamepad. She knows that clearing the game is the only way to escape.

Features:

  • Two game modes.

    - Roguelikes : For players who love chaotic feelings. It comes with a level-up system that gives the player a chance to get a new weapon or upgrade their weapon.
    - Challenge : For players who love a challenge, this mode allows players to choose only one sub-weapon at the beginning of each level.

  • Hand-drawn animations

  • Multiple weapon upgrades

  • A ton of different enemy types

  • Online leaderboards.
